description_long: This object depicts a stylized human figure wearing a pair of high-top quad roller skates. The skates are predominantly white with pink wheels, pink laces, and a teal accent around the heel and sole. The figure's legs are elongated and the boots feature a classic lace-up design, with the laces forming a crisscross pattern up the front. The wheels are large and rounded, giving the skates a playful, cartoon-like appearance. No other clothing or protective gear is visible, and the figure's upper body is not present, focusing attention on the skates and lower legs. The overall design is clean, smooth, and visually appealing, suitable for urban or recreational environments.
description: A stylized figure wearing white and pink high-top quad roller skates with teal accents and crisscross laces. The design is playful and clean, emphasizing the skates and lower legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crisscross pink laces, rounded pink wheels, and the high-top design of the skates.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the teal heel accent, the full profile of the boot, and the arrangement of the four wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the boots, teal heel, and the alignment of the wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the skates, with visible laces and wheel arrangement.
attribute_roller_skates: Quad roller skates with four pink wheels per skate, high-top white boots, pink crisscross laces, and teal heel/sole accents; classic retro design.
attribute_clothing_style: The figure is only depicted from the knees down, wearing high-top roller skates with no visible clothing or accessories, giving a minimal and stylized appearance.
attribute_pose: The figure stands upright with both feet on the ground, legs straight, and no dynamic action or limb movement implied.
